title: Spook and Fright
body:
# Spook and Fright
Spook and Fright is a Halloween themed update which was made for fun, so this might not get updated to ,but will see in future!

Features!
<details>
<summary>Haunted House</summary>

# Haunted House
Currently the Haunted house doesn't do much except give some basic starter loot like:
 - Copper Ingot
 - Rotten Flesh
 - Iron Nugget
 - Cobweb
 - Glass Bottle
 - Coal
 - Soul Lantern

 and also beware of spiders.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Spider Sizes</summary>

# Spider Size
Spiders are now able to be either Small like tarantulas or big, like 2 times there normal size big, and there damage and movement speed is also changed to fit its size!
</details>
<details>
<summary>Candies</summary>

# Candies
Candies are a new food item that can be eaten even when full! Candies can be only be crafted or by Candy Pouches. Candies Can come in a few colors such as:
- Red
- Orange
- Cyan
- Purple

now on its own, these candies dont do much. but when paired with any ingredient to make a positive potion effect, these candies will get that effect but it will only last for 20 seconds, and can also be upgraded once again with a single piece of nether wart, increasing its amplifier while making the duration to be only 10 seconds.
</details>


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
